name: Nemotron 3.5 ASR — Streaming + Word Boosting on Gold-92
short_description: Per-clip STT predictions from NVIDIA Nemotron 3.5 ASR in streaming mode with word-boosting API on all 93 gold-92 benchmark clips. Word boosting degraded all accuracy metrics vs. batch.
model_description: NVIDIA Nemotron 3.5 ASR (FastConformer-CTC), NeMo/Riva NIM, GPU inference, streaming mode with word-boosting API using DOMAIN_VOCAB

files.description: Per-clip STT predictions on all 93 gold-92 benchmark clips. Each line: clip_id, hypothesis, latency_seconds, chunk_seconds.
